series_metadata.series_title: CLAIMS, LITIGATION, COLLECTION AND INVESTIGATION FILES
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, documents relative to legal matters of which the Ohio Development Services Agency is, or may be, a party. Also includes certifications, administrative hearings, internal or external investigations, correspondence, legal opinions, and other records related to actual or potential legal matters.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office area two (2) years case is closed and no further appeals can be filed LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed. ; Paper: period specified electronic format
